Source: https://github.com/trineutron/othello
Deployed site: https://trineutron.github.io/othello/
Fetched for stage30 interoperability benchmarking.

Included files:
- scripts/main.js (original upstream browser engine, MIT)
- LICENSE (upstream license)

This project also contains tools/engine-match/opponents/trineutron-engine.mjs,
which is a Node-friendly adapter derived from the upstream engine so the same
search/eval logic can be used in offline match benchmarks with color swapping.
